paper_title: CodeXGLUE: A Machine Learning Benchmark Dataset for Code Understanding and Generation
evaluation_method: CodeXGLUE is a multi-task benchmark with 10 tasks across 14 datasets. Evaluation metrics are task-specific: text-to-code generation uses exact match (EM) and smoothed BLEU; code-to-code translation uses exact match, BLEU, and CodeBLEU (weighted combination of n-gram match, weighted n-gram match, AST match, and data-flow match); clone detection uses F1; defect detection uses accuracy; code search uses MRR; code summarization uses smoothed BLEU-4; code completion uses token-level accuracy and exact match.
